2026年 4 月 15 日，星期三，晴

leetcode 07,08,09, LC07 → “string manipulation + overflow handling” LC08 → “string to integer (atoi)” -> “string parsing + state machine” LC09 → “math / palindrome check” Blog: https://andihappy5.github.io/2026/04/08/LC-07-08-09/

DDIA，page29-31, Most reliability issues come from human (operator) errors and software errors, not hardware failures “In my experience, most production issues are caused by configuration changes. So we should design systems to minimize dangerous operations and make them reversible.”

“We should design systems that are resilient to operator errors, for example by using validation, rollback mechanisms, and gradual rollout.”

resume: Built workflow engine based on Activiti, supporting complex operations such as countersign, configurable rollback mechanisms, and reassignment. Designed decoupled architecture between workflow and form modules, improving system flexibility and maintainability Contributed to XBRL-based financial reporting system, supporting structured financial data processing
